glosses.ja: 口がきけない; 無音の

sentences.target: Je mets mon téléphone en mode muet.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mɛ mɔ̃ telefɔn ɑ̃ mɔd mɥɛ/

translations.fr: Je mets mon téléphone en mode muet.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mɛ mɔ̃ telefɔn ɑ̃ mɔd mɥɛ/
translations.en: I'm putting my phone on silent mode.
translations.es: Pongo mi teléfono en modo silencio.
translations.de: Ich stelle mein Handy auf lautlos.
translations.it: Metto il telefono in modalità silenziosa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把手机调成静音模式。
translations.yue: 我將電話設為靜音模式。
translations.ru: Я перевожу телефон в беззвучный режим.
translations.pt: Coloco o meu telefone no modo silencioso.
translations.he: אני מעביר את הטלפון למצב שקט.
translations.vi: Tôi bật chế độ im lặng cho điện thoại.
translations.nl: Ik zet mijn telefoon op stil.
translations.uk: Я перемикаю телефон у беззвучний режим.
translations.hi: मैं अपना फ़ोन साइलेंट कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω το τηλέφωνό μου σε αθόρυβη λειτουργία.
translations.nb: Jeg setter telefonen min på lydløs.
translations.id: Saya mengatur ponsel ke mode senyap.
translations.sv: Jag sätter min telefon på ljudlöst.
translations.ro: Îmi pun telefonul pe modul silențios.
translations.da: Jeg sætter min telefon på lydløs.
translations.ja: スマホをマナーモードにします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb 'mets'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'mon téléphone' as direct object and the PP 'en mode muet' as a complement indicating resulting state.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular form agreeing with 'téléphone'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'mets'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'en mode muet', marking the target state.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'en' and head of the NP modified by 'muet'.
Adjective, masculine singular; attributive modifier of 'mode' indicating the 'silent' setting.

sentences.target: Il reste muet devant la question.

translations.fr: Il reste muet devant la question.
translations.en: He stays silent when asked that question.
translations.es: Se queda callado ante la pregunta.
translations.it: Resta in silenzio di fronte a quella domanda.
translations.zh-Hans: 被问到那个问题时，他保持沉默。
translations.yue: 一問到嗰條問題，佢就唔出聲。
translations.pt: Ele fica em silêncio diante dessa pergunta.
translations.he: כששואלים את השאלה הזאת, הוא שותק.
translations.vi: Khi bị hỏi câu đó, anh ấy im lặng.
translations.ar: عندما يُسأل هذا السؤال، يلتزم الصمت.
translations.hi: उस सवाल पर वह चुप रहता है.
translations.el: Σε αυτή την ερώτηση παραμένει σιωπηλός.
translations.id: Saat ditanya pertanyaan itu, ia diam.
translations.sv: När han får den frågan är han tyst.
translations.da: Når han får det spørgsmål, er han tavs.
translations.ja: その質問をされると、彼は黙ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular; subject of 'reste'.
Lexical verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes the predicate adjective 'muet' as a subject complement.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate adjective (subject complement) agreeing with 'il'.
Preposition meaning 'before/in front of', introducing the PP 'la question'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'question'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Le micro du salon est muet.

translations.fr: Le micro du salon est muet.
translations.en: The living room mic is mute.
translations.es: El micrófono del salón está silenciado.
translations.de: Das Mikrofon im Wohnzimmer ist stummgeschaltet.
translations.it: Il microfono del salotto è silenziato.
translations.zh-Hans: 客厅的麦克风被静音了。
translations.pt: O microfone da sala está silenciado.
translations.vi: Mic trong phòng khách đang bị tắt tiếng.
translations.ar: الميكروفون في غرفة الجلوس مكتوم الصوت.
translations.nl: De microfoon in de woonkamer staat gedempt.
translations.hu: A nappaliban lévő mikrofon le van némítva.
translations.hi: लिविंग रूम का माइक म्यूट है.
translations.el: Το μικρόφωνο στο σαλόνι είναι σε σίγαση.
translations.id: Mikrofon di ruang tamu sedang dibisukan.
translations.ro: Microfonul din living este pe mut.
translations.da: Mikrofonen i stuen er slået fra.
translations.ja: リビングのマイクはミュートになっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'micro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le' ('de + le'); introduces the genitival complement 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.
Copular auxiliary in present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective 'muet'.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate adjective describing the subject 'micro'.

sentences.target: On regarde un film muet ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁəɡaʁd œ̃ film mɥɛ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On regarde un film muet ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁəɡaʁd œ̃ film mɥɛ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We're watching a silent movie tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche vemos una película muda.
translations.de: Wir schauen heute Abend einen Stummfilm.
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы смотрим немое кино.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos assistir a um filme mudo.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng mình xem một bộ phim câm.
translations.nl: Vanavond kijken we een stomme film.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми дивимося німий фільм.
translations.hi: आज रात हम एक मूक फ़िल्म देख रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ βλέπουμε βουβή ταινία.
translations.nb: I kveld ser vi en stumfilm.
translations.id: Malam ini kita menonton film bisu.
translations.sv: Ikväll tittar vi på en stumfilm.
translations.ro: Diseară ne uităm la un film mut.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se díváme na němý film.
translations.da: I aften ser vi en stumfilm.
translations.ja: 今夜は無声映画を観ます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun used colloquially for 'we'; syntactically 3rd person singular; subject of 'regarde'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'un film' as direct object and is modified by the temporal NP 'ce soir'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'regarde'.
Adjective, masculine singular; attributive modifier of 'film'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; part of the fixed time expression 'ce soir' functioning as a temporal adjunct.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the time expression 'ce soir' used adverbially ('tonight').
